name: Rippa's Snarlfangs
inspire:
After a Power step, if a friendly fighter is equipped with 2 or more Upgrades, Inspire that fighter.

After a friendly fighter Attacks again as a result of the Snarlfang's Jaws Weapon ability, if that Attack is successful, Inspire that fighter.

abilities.name: Snarlfang's Jaws
abilities.rulesText:
If a friendly fighter's weapon has the {icon:hex} runemark, you have access to the following Weapon ability:

Snarlfang's Jaws {icon:hex}: After a successful or drawn Attack, the attacker can immediately Attack again using the relevant weapon below. These weapons cannot be modified.

If the attacker is Uninspired, use this weapon:
{icon:cleave} {icon:fury}1 1 {icon:skull}2

If the attacker is Inspired, use this weapon:
{icon:cleave} {icon:fury}1 {icon:crit}2 {icon:skull}2

abilities.name: Pack Tactics
abilities.flavorText: Rippa and his cronies might not get along, but they're no strangers to ganging up on prey.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick an enemy fighter. Push each friendly fighter 1 hex closer to that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Smell Weakness
abilities.flavorText: Both grots and Snarlfangs love picking on the weak; in tandem, they make a vicious combination.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. In the next turn, rolls of {icon:dodge} and {icon:shield} do not count as successes in Attack rolls or Save rolls for enemy fighters adjacent to any friendly fighters. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Duck and Dive
abilities.flavorText: Call it luck, call it agility - either way, it's saved Rippa and his crew more than once.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Save rolls made for that fighter for that Attack count as having more {icon:skull} than the Attack roll for the purposes of Stand Fast. You can only use this ability once per game.
